title: Telegram AI Chatbot Prototype
shortDescription: A controlled chatbot environment for testing product replies, conversation state, data collection, and notification logic before wider platform integration.
overview: Telegram provided a practical environment for testing workflow logic independently of a production ecommerce channel.
The prototype focused on predictable state handling, product context, and structured user data.
problem: Automation logic needed to be tested safely before being connected to a live customer channel.
solution: I created a Telegram-based test flow and used it to validate message stages, response behavior, and data handling.
results: A safer environment for workflow iteration
